anonymizedText:
[CANDIDATE_NAME] — Test engineer.
Skills: Playwright, Cypress, API checks. No k6 or performance tooling listed.

response.match_summary: Playwright present; k6 missing from CV.

questions.question: The role requires k6 load testing but your CV only lists Playwright and Cypress — how would you introduce k6 here?
questions.rationale: k6 is in expected_skills but absent from the anonymized CV.
